arts.ttl: €80-100m rated Bayern Munich target Jamie Gittens may be available for sale if Borussia Dortmund do not reach the Champions League
arts.sum: Should they fail to qualify for the Champions League next season, Borussia Dortmund are planning to sell a ‘star player’ in order to offset the financial losses. But if Die Borussen do miss out and break their streak of regular Champions League participation, consequential action would need to be taken.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Celtic – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Celtic travel to Germany to face Bayern Munich tonight needing to overturn a 2-1 deficit in the Champions League. In the first leg of their playoff tie, the Bavarian giants gained a lead through Michael Olise and Harry Kane. However, Daizen Maeda halved the deficit to give Celtic something to fight for tonight. arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers makes admission about his first spell at Celtic that could explain hasty 2019 exit to Leicester City
arts.sum: Rodgers was asked how different he is now as a manager from his first time around at Celtic and what he said could be a clue as to why he left the club in 2019 for Leicester City. “I think when I came, the ambition to take Celtic, probably for me, might have been, when I look back at it, a little bit unrealistic.

arts.sum: The world may not fancy Celtic tonight but these three reckon there's always a chance

arts.ttl: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers is sure his team won’t go down easily vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Celtic FC coach Brendan Rodgers is well aware that the odds are stacked against his team, but that will not stop him from pushing his boys to the limit in an attempt to do something that some consider impossible — take down Bayern Munich on their home turf in the Champions League . When you get to this point, you want to play top-level teams.

arts.sum: Kasper Schmeichel reacts to Harry Kane missing Bayern Munich training ahead of Celtic game Bayern Munich hold a 2-1 lead over Celtic and the champions of Scotland would need to win by a two-goal margin or more to quality inside 120 minutes.
